subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! That pure paternal spirit, having ascended unto God, did inhale the holy fragrances, whereupon its countenance blossomed even as a rose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل ب نار محبت الله آن روح پاک ابوی متصاعد الی الله چون استنشاق نفحات قدس نمود چون گل رویش برشکفت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @eulogies; reminiscences
